title: 11 BPRP Data Files
body_text:
11	BPRP Data Files
11.1	Overview of BPRP Data Files
This Chapter applies to BC and Ontario credit unions and other Central 1 clients. Financial institutions in other provinces, contact your provincial central on data file availability.
BPRP data files allow Corporate Creditors to automatically credit their customersâ accounts. The Corporate Creditor downloads the data file from Central 1âs File and Report Exchange and imports the file into its own system.
Note:	If there is a system outage and files will be late, or if there are problems with a file, a communication email is sent out via Client Support Services.
The Corporate Creditor can select from one of the following available file formats:
Flat File Format
â A customized file format developed by Central 1. This file format requires some programming by the Corporate Creditor to enable the posting of the file. Flat Files are generated five days per week, regardless of holidays or whether there are transactions.
EDI File Format
â A format extracted from the EDI format as described in CPA Rule H6. This is an industry standard file format and can be compatible with some third-party software. EDI Files are generated five days per week, regardless of holidays. An EDI file is not generated if there are no transactions for the day.
See the File Exchange and Report Distribution Part for information on accessing the File and Report Exchange. Provide the applicable procedures on accessing the File and Report Exchange to Corporate Creditors as described in Section 6.8, Providing File and Report Exchange Procedures and File Formats to Corporate Creditors.
11.2	Changing the File Format for BPRP Data Files
A Corporate Creditor contacts Central 1 Client Support Services directly to request changes to the file format that BPRP data files are delivered in.
Client Support Services â Bill Payments
Email:

END
